## Problem or motivation

<!-- What limitation, friction, or missing capability prompted this request? Be specific about the scenario. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe what you'd like to see added or changed. If you have a UI idea, a rough mockup or description helps. -->

## Would this affect privacy or security?

<!-- Does the proposed feature require new permissions, new API calls, or storing additional data? -->

- [ ] Yes — <!-- explain -->
- [ ] No

## Scope

<!-- How significant is this change? -->

- [ ] Small — minor UI tweak or wording
- [ ] Medium — new filter, export format, or UI section
- [ ] Large — new core feature or architectural change

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Have you thought of other ways to solve the problem? Why is your proposal preferable? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Mockups, links to similar tools, or any other context that helps evaluate the request. -->
